amenities: resort-style pools with splash zones and dual waterslides
Rancho Sienna.incentives: VA/FHA/conventional friendly, potential USDA on select homes, 4.99% fixed rate promo on select homes, rate buydowns available
Rancho Sienna.notes: 435-acre master-planned community, one and two story options, quick move-ins available

Esperanza.price_range: from the $310s to $786K+ (KB Home entry from $310K, Highland Homes to $786K+)
Esperanza.school_district: Boerne ISD (A-rated, Dr. Herff Elementary on-site, Boerne Middle School North, Boerne High School)
amenities: The Club (11-acre amenity center with resort-style pool, lazy river, splash pad, kids pool)
20+ miles of hiking and biking trails
Roca Loca Lawn (event space with bandstand, food truck area, firepit)
450+ acres of preserved green space and parks
Esperanza.incentives: builder-specific promotions, VA/FHA/conventional friendly, multiple builders competing on incentives
Esperanza.lot_size: 45 ft to 70 ft+ homesites (varies by builder and section)
Esperanza.notes: 1,700-acre master-planned community in Boerne (Kendall County), 6 active builders (KB Home, Chesmar, Scott Felder, Perry Homes, Highland Homes, Weston Dean), Hill Country terrain with live oaks, on-site elementary school, 55+ Regency section by Toll Brothers, Best Overall Community (TAB 2021 & 2023), ~30 min from San Antonio, MUD district tax rate 2.5%+

Ventana.school_district: Stahl Elementary, Driscoll Middle, Madison High (NEISD)
Ventana.incentives: VA/FHA/conventional friendly, rate buydowns and closing cost help on select homes
Ventana.notes: 8 floorplans, one and two story options, 2 car garages, go cozy or go roomy

amenities: Palazzo Clubhouse (9-acre amenity center, resort-style pool with splash pad, 2,000 sq ft fitness center, tennis courts, pickleball courts, covered pavilion with fireplace)
The Forum (second amenity center: pool with tanning ledge and lap lanes, pickleball/basketball flex court, indoor wellness studio, yoga room, recreational pond, zipline playground)
350+ acres of open Hill Country space
miles of hiking and biking trails
Travisso.incentives: builder-specific promotions from Taylor Morrison and Toll Brothers
Travisso.lot_size: 60 ft to 100 ft homesites (0.15 to 0.5+ acres)
Travisso.notes: Award-winning luxury master-planned community in Leander (Hill Country views), builders: Taylor Morrison and Toll Brothers, near NW Austin tech corridor (Apple, Dell ~20 min), Crystal Falls Golf Course nearby, tax rate ~2.48%, 2019 Best Amenities, 2017 Best Clubhouse in Texas

amenities: 700+ acres of protected canyons and natural terrain
